signals.label: Activation is 27% against 40% target
signals.summary: Beta activation is 27%; mobile Safari OAuth drop-off is 41%; 9 of 33 invited teams reached a shared workspace.

signals.label: Invite failures spiked across design partners
signals.summary: Support logged 14 invite failure tickets in 5 days, including 6 from design partners blocked after OAuth redirect.

signals.label: SSO is planned for Q3, not May beta
signals.summary: Roadmap shows SSO / Enterprise Auth target date as 2026-09-30 while May beta security copy implies near-term readiness.

belief: Activation and onboarding blockers are under control.
reality: Design partners are still blocked by workspace invite failures.
recommendedActions: Move May Beta Readiness to at-risk.
Escalate the workspace invite fix before the next beta cohort email.
Publish a design partner update before founder review.

evidence.title: Activation is 27% against 40% target
evidence.summary: Beta activation is 27%; mobile Safari OAuth drop-off is 41%; 9 of 33 invited teams reached a shared workspace.

evidence.title: Invite failures spiked across design partners
evidence.summary: Support logged 14 invite failure tickets in 5 days, including 6 from design partners blocked after OAuth redirect.

evidence.title: Northstar Studio blocked on invites and SOC2-lite packet
evidence.summary: Northstar Studio is a $72k ARR design partner waiting on workspace invites, SSO direction, and the SOC2-lite security packet.

approvals.action: Move May Beta Readiness from green to at-risk until activation recovers.
Prioritize PR #417 and block activation sprint sign-off until merged.

trial.title: The People vs. May Beta Readiness
charges: Calling beta readiness green while activation is below target.
Declaring onboarding solved while invite failures block design partners.
Claiming trust readiness while security docs and SSO timing are unresolved.
sentence: Send design partners a trust readiness update.
